# Pratik Mehta

> Creative Director and Brand Strategist in New York. 10+ years across brand identity, motion, UI/UX, social, and performance marketing, in fintech, sports and entertainment, e-commerce, and global events. CS degree from NYU. Gen AI used as a production layer, not a novelty. Open to creative-director and brand or marketing leadership roles.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://mehtapratik.com/): positioning, selected work, and contact.
- [About](https://mehtapratik.com/about): background, approach, and career narrative.
- [Resume](https://mehtapratik.com/resume): experience, skills, and education.
- [Work](https://mehtapratik.com/work): selected case studies across eight industries.
- [Brand](https://mehtapratik.com/brand): the brand system behind the site.
- [Contact](https://mehtapratik.com/contact): email and availability.

## Selected work
- [SPORTIME Clubs](https://mehtapratik.com/work/sportime-clubs): brand and a video-first content engine across tennis, pickleball, and a $75M facility expansion.
- [The Ninth](https://mehtapratik.com/work/the-ninth): esports membership concept with a live AI moment-clipper.
- [Level](https://mehtapratik.com/work/level): responsible prediction-market product concept.
- [WISP](https://mehtapratik.com/work/wisp): faceless live AI host concept.
- [DealNews](https://mehtapratik.com/work/dealnews): marketplace and app redesign for 17M monthly users.
- [The Forest Road Company](https://mehtapratik.com/work/frc): motion for a Series B media-finance firm.
- [Richard Attias & Associates](https://mehtapratik.com/work/raa): environmental, digital, and print for the FII 2019 forum in Riyadh.
- [Pipeline Medical](https://mehtapratik.com/work/pipeline-medical): brand and supplier marketplace for healthcare procurement.
- [SR Love and Care](https://mehtapratik.com/work/sr-love-and-care): built and handed off a volunteer design team.
- [Johnny Mac Tennis Project](https://mehtapratik.com/work/jmtp): event graphics and photography for two fundraisers.
- [Agency FiveEighty](https://mehtapratik.com/work/agency-fiveeighty): broadcast motion and a 33-ad conquest campaign.
- [Photography](https://mehtapratik.com/work/photography): sports, events, and personal work shot across New York.

## Journal
- [All posts](https://mehtapratik.com/blog): notes on brand, product, and the AI shift.
- [Trust Is the Interface](https://mehtapratik.com/blog/trust-is-the-interface)

- [Taste Is the Bottleneck Now](https://mehtapratik.com/blog/taste-is-the-bottleneck-now)
- [GenAI Is a Production Layer, Not a Magic Trick](https://mehtapratik.com/blog/genai-production-layer-not-magic-trick)
